svg.text: A multi-modal protein engineering framework that maps heterogeneous evidence into a shared residue energy field
SECTION II SHARED RESIDUE ENERGY FIELD
Evidence streams project into site-wise residue energies and pairwise coupling structure
C(i, j, a, b) pairwise coupling energies
E(x) = Σ_i U(i, x_i) + Σ_(i,j∈N) C(i, j, x_i, x_j)
ancestral and phylogenetic priors set the energy background
Field-to-sequence search under explicit engineering constraints
Normalize per target, enforce prior consistency, and suppress unsafe winners
target-wise normalization • safety gating • uncertainty-aware shortlist

Current implementation already includes motif-atlas retrieval, explicit ancestral fields, shared residue field construction, pairwise engineering energy, structured decoding, calibrated selection, unified benchmark outputs, and visualization bundles.
